assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 16-19 show: 'Check out the target branch and pull latest: git checkout TC-9005 / git pull' — explicitly checks out TC-9005, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 83-87 show: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title ...' with the explicit note on line 104: '--base TC-9005 ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 21-23 show: 'Create the task branch named after this task's Jira issue ID (TC-9205, distinct from the target branch TC-9005): git checkout -b TC-9205'. Line 26 reiterates: 'The task branch is TC-9205. The target (base) branch is TC-9005.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 29-39 under 'Pre-Implementation Inspection' explicitly lists all three files: (1) migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs — 'Read this file to understand the existing migration pattern', (2) entity/src/advisory.rs — 'Verify that the status column is no longer referenced', (3) migration/src/lib.rs — 'Read this file to understand how migrations are registered'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 72 shows the commit command: 'git commit --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' -m "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table..."'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 60-67 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type=feat, scope=migration) and footer 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8: 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch -- extracted from the Target Branch section of the task description)'. Line 13 further states: 'The Target Branch section specifies TC-9005, which is a feature branch (not main).'
